channel.title: Venture-Building on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Venture-Building on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Terminal is Your Chalk Circle: Why I Code from the Observation Deck
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why leading in the era of Generative AI requires a shift from ‘getting your hands dirty’ in code to observing systems like a Toyota foreman in a chalk circle.

item.title: Beyond the Hype: What Pushkin Industries Teaches Us About Scaling Without Losing Your Soul
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A cautionary case study on Pushkin Industries’ ‘growth at all costs’ gamble, exploring the thin line between aggressive expansion and operational collapse.

item.title: Beyond the Green Premium: The Pragmatic Realities of EV Mobility in Southeast Asia
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A deep dive into the pragmatic realities of EV fleet adoption in Southeast Asia, moving beyond the ‘green premium’ to focus on margin survival, infrastructure moats, and the ‘poverty anxiety’ of the mass market.

item.title: The Mechanics of Institutional-Grade Innovation: Structuring This Platform
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An operational breakdown of the CEO Playbook brand architecture and how its structure reflects the rigor of institutional-grade venture building.

item.title: Signals: Week 05, 2026
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: The professionalization of the AI era: Moving from vibe coding to agentic engineering, and why business is a design job.

item.title: Moats in the Era of Vibe Coding
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: In a world where AI tools let almost anyone quickly prototype and ship software, traditional moats are eroding. This article explores 8 durable moats for the AI era and maps them to Hamilton Helmer’s 7 Powers.

item.title: Asia Pacific Series: Building the Blocks of Embedded Finance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: John Januszczak joins Chia Jeng Yang of Saison Capital to discuss the mechanics of building financial infrastructure and venture studios in the Philippines.
